title: Auction House listings (v1)
description: The dynamic set of active player auction listings, persisted as data/auctions/listings.json and rewritten in full on every change (issue #357). The static Auction House definition (which room and auctioneer) lives separately in data/auctions/auction-house.*.json. The loader tolerates unknown properties (AGENTS.md §11).

listings.description: The active listings, in insertion (oldest-first) order. AUCTION LIST numbers them 1..N in this order.

seller.description: Username of the player who listed the item; receives the gold (via MAIL/offline credit) when it sells and the item back if it expires.

item.description: The listed item, serialised with the shared item schema (docs/schemas/item.v*.json).

price.description: Asking price in gold; must be positive.

room_id.description: Id of the Auction House room the listing was created at.

created_tick.description: Game tick the listing was created.

expiry_tick.description: Game tick at which the listing expires and is returned to the seller.
